stories.title: Takeaways from Lakers-Rockets Game 5
stories.summary: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the Western Conference's first round.

stories.title: Rockets outlast Lakers to push series to Game 6
stories.summary: The Rockets prevailed late against the Lakers on Wednesday after faltering in a similar situation last week, avoiding elimination for the second straight game and trimming L.A.'s lead in the series to 3-2.

stories.title: Source: Amid LIV unrest, players exploring return
stories.summary: Amid uncertainty about the Saudi-backed tour's future, multiple representatives for LIV Golf players have started to reach out to the PGA Tour to explore what a path back would look like, a source told ESPN on Wednesday.

stories.title: Cade's 45 do trick vs. Magic as Pistons stay alive...
stories.summary: Cade Cunningham scored a franchise playoff-record 45 points, including a step-back jumper with 32 seconds left, as the Pistons beat the Magic to stave off elimination.

stories.title: Cavs let Schroder cook in 4th, regain series contr...
stories.summary: Limited in the first four games, Dennis Schroder broke out in Wednesday's Game 5, scoring 11 of his 19 points in the fourth as the Cavs won 125-120 to take a 3-2 series lead.
